title: Pricing Transcript Services for Your Tax Practice
description: A practical pricing guide for tax professionals offering transcript analysis — from solo practitioners to multi-preparer firms.
content:
The Case for Explicit Transcript Pricing

Many tax professionals absorb transcript review time into their hourly rate — which means they're often undercharging for specialized work that clients genuinely value. Explicit transcript service pricing creates a clear deliverable, sets expectations, and increases perceived value.

Pricing Models That Work

Flat Fee per Transcript

The simplest model: $99–$199 per transcript analyzed, with a written report delivered. Best for one-time clients and new client onboarding. The parser makes this highly profitable — 10 seconds of processing time, 15 minutes of review, $149 billed.

Bundled Onboarding Package

Include transcript review in a $299–$499 new client onboarding package alongside engagement letter, intake interview, and initial advisory session. Positions your firm as thorough and systematic.

Monitoring Membership Add-On

Pair transcript review with an ongoing monitoring membership: $39–$99/month for continuous transcript monitoring plus an annual deep-dive review. Creates recurring revenue and stickier client relationships.

Resolution Case Retainer

For resolution practices, include unlimited transcript pulls and analysis in a case retainer. The parser reduces your per-transcript cost to under $1.50 — making high-volume transcript work economically viable.

What the Market Charges

Based on practitioner surveys and published fee schedules: solo EAs and CPAs charge $99–$199 for a standalone transcript review. Boutique resolution firms charge $250–$500 as part of a broader diagnostic. Large firms include it in onboarding packages priced at $500+.

Communicating Value to Clients

The key phrase: 'This report shows everything the IRS has on file about your account — in plain English.' Most clients have never seen their IRS transcript. The report is tangible proof of your expertise and the value of the engagement.
